summary: Iteration 60 - Testing driver portal login with phone/PIN, system settings tab, select all/clear all drivers, and permissions hiding for roles

details: Wrong PIN shows error message 'الرمز السري غير صحيح'
System Settings tab (إعدادات النظام) found in Settings page
Clear All button (إلغاء تحديد الكل) appears after selecting all
Delete Selected button (حذف المحدد) appears when drivers selected
Select All button reappears after clearing selection
Delivery role shows predefined permissions message
Waiter role shows predefined permissions message
Kitchen role shows predefined permissions message
Cashier role shows full permissions checkboxes (no predefined message)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly: Driver portal login with phone/PIN, System Settings tab with currency/language/country settings, Select All/Clear All drivers functionality, and permissions hiding for delivery/waiter/kitchen roles.
